generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://www.example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://www.example.org/base#
instance OperationalMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of building operational data for real-time insights"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for maintenance and performance forecasting"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of building systems for energy optimization",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time interactive visualization of building systems for monitoring and control"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of operational data for building systems",
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for maintenance and performance forecasting",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
]

instance InfrastructureOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of infrastructure management for data-driven decision-making",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "High-fidelity interactive visualization and simulation environments using Unreal Engine",
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance Bim : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Used for structured data management via Building Information Modeling"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables real-time IoT data exchange and device management",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables real-time IoT data exchange and device management",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides high-fidelity interactive visualization and simulation environments",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance DTFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Centralized hub managing multiple operational digital twin instances roles include Building Control Engineers for device modeling, Facility Managers for monitoring/control, and DT Engineers for service integration",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, InfrastructureOptimizationService, VisualizationService
]

instance BuildingTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingTemperatureSensor
]

instance BuildingTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from physical building sensors synchronized with digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingTemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BuildingTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Defined and configured within BIM environment by Building Control Engineers for temperature monitoring spatial distribution and operational parameters embedded live operational data collected and synchronized in real-time",
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Modeled and configured within BIM environment by Building Control Engineers control logic defined for precise actuation of HVAC systems"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Modeled and configured within BIM environment by Building Control Engineers control logic defined for lighting system actuation"
]

instance BCSModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based geometric and semantic models for Building Control System components (sensors, actuators, controllers)",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Bim
]

instance AECOBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building in Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain integrating static design models with real-time operational data for simulation, analysis, and optimization across its entire lifecycle",
    base:contains BCSModel, BuildingTemperatureSensor, HVACActuator, LightingController, DTFramework
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the digital twin are sent to Building Control Systems (BCS) via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, allowing facility managers to operate physical infrastructure with bidirectional feedback mechanisms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points supports integration of custom services and analytics, runtime configuration management enables adjustments without full redeployment, and the DT Framework acts as a central hub coordinating roles for holistic building lifecycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle comprises initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, automated transformation via Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) to generate deployable artifacts, real-time operational synchronization through continuous data exchange and interactive visualization for Facility Managers, and evolution via modular extension points supporting custom services developed by DT Engineers to address changing operational needs."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is quantified using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess alignment between the digital twin and physical counterpart. Validation processes include systematic checks during model transformation from BIM and runtime operations, with error detection and correction mechanisms ensuring continuous accuracy and reliability of the twin's representations."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM is established as a standard solution in the construction industry, yet the absence of standardized integration frameworks for Digital Twins necessitates our framework's development. The solution implements standardized extension points to ensure modular interoperability of custom services and analytics, addressing critical gaps in DT standardization."
]
